message:
Fix DOMPurify install, DeleteWorkload test, SlackID persistence, Antigravity CLI validation (#4642)

- Install dompurify and @types/dompurify packages (fixes #4630)
- Seed fake client with deployment object in TestDeleteWorkload (fixes #4634)
- Fix JSON tag mismatch: handler expected "slack_id" but API sends "slackId" (fixes #4635)
- Validate configured CLI path exists before running handshake (fixes #4637)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
